attacking_style: Demonstrates climbing ability suited for breakaway roles on mountainous stages, particularly showing strength on KOM-classified climbs where he can distance typical breakaway riders.
team_tactics: Limited data on team setup, but appears to operate with freedom to join opportunistic breakaways rather than being protected for GC ambitions.
terrain_preference: KOM climbs where pure climbing strength separates breakaway specialists; early career suggests developing climber still finding optimal terrain gradient and length.
vulnerability: Susceptible to bad days that completely derail GC ambitions; lacks consistency to maintain top-10 positions across multi-day races when form dips.
key_patterns: Shows climbing strength exceeding typical breakaway riders on categorized climbs (Giro d'Italia evidence)
Inconsistent form across stage races leads to significant GC position losses (UAE Tour collapse)
Operating as second-year professional still developing tactical race craft and consistency
form_trajectory: unknown: contradictory signals with strong climbing shown at Giro after earlier UAE collapse; insufficient recent data for trajectory assessment
